'''shawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:obovately|obovately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obovately|obovately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shawate|shawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shawatesher|shawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawatesherĂ«m|shawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shawatero|shawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawateshĂ«|shawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawateshĂ«m|shawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishawatero|gokishawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawateshĂ«|gokishawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawateshĂ«m|gokishawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshawankerom|goshawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawankeshĂ«|goshawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawankeshĂ«m|goshawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshawankeya|goshawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shawaterom|shawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawatemu|shawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shawateya|shawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishawaterom|gokishawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawatemu|gokishawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishawateya|gokishawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shawawate|shawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shawawatesher|shawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawatesherĂ«m|shawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shawawatero|shawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawawateshĂ«|shawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawateshĂ«m|shawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishawawatero|gokishawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawawateshĂ«|gokishawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawawateshĂ«m|gokishawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshawawankerom|goshawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawawankeshĂ«|goshawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawawankeshĂ«m|goshawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshawawankeya|goshawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shawawaterom|shawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawatemu|shawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shawawateya|shawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishawawaterom|gokishawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawawatemu|gokishawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishawawateya|gokishawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠte|shĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠtesher|shĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠtero|shĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠwĂŠtero|gokishĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠwĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠwĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠterom|shĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠtemu|shĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠwĂŠteya|shĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠwĂŠterom|gokishĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠwĂŠteya|gokishĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafwafte|shafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafwaftesher|shafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafwaftesherĂ«m|shafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafwaftero|shafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafwafteshĂ«|shafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafwafteshĂ«m|shafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafwaftero|gokishafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafwafteshĂ«|gokishafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafwafteshĂ«m|gokishafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafwafnkerom|goshafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafwafnkeshĂ«|goshafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafwafnkeshĂ«m|goshafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafwafnkeya|goshafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafwafterom|shafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafwaftemu|shafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafwafteya|shafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafwafterom|gokishafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafwaftemu|gokishafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafwafteya|gokishafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
